name: Prey of the Wolf Pack
description:
Trapped. Claimed. Bred.


You and your girlfriend were deep in the forest.
Night fell too fast. Strange howls surrounded you.
Glowing eyes appeared in the darkness… then rough hands dragged you both away.

You wake up in the heart of a hidden wolf-people tribe — primal, savage, ruled by brutal instinct and raw lust.

The towering Alpha immediately claims your girlfriend as his new prize.
and his cunning right-hand watches her with hungry eyes, already plotting to steal her for himself.
creator: 1Masturbek
